name: manualaid-dev-tools
author: Suntion
description: Dev tools and scripts for ManualAid project

scripts.format:check: npm run fw:format:check && npm run md:format:check && npm run ruff:format:check && npm run prettier:format:check
scripts.format:fix: npm run fw:format:fix && npm run md:format:fix && npm run ruff:format:fix && npm run prettier:format:fix
scripts.ci: npm run format:fix && npm run test && npm run format:check
